service.name: Spotify Web API
service.description_for_ai: World's largest music streaming platform API. Search songs, artists, albums, playlists. Get audio features (tempo, energy, danceability). Control playback. Free to use for reading data. Use for music recommendations, song info, playlist creation, 'what song is this', 'find music by mood'.

auth.note: Client Credentials flow for reading public data (no user login needed). Authorization Code flow for user-specific actions.
auth.cost: Free for reading data. Premium account needed for playback control.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search Spotify catalog for tracks, artists, albums or playlists. Use for 'find song X', 'songs by artist Y', 'albums like Z', 'playlist for working out'.

q.description: Search query. Can include field filters: artist:Radiohead, year:2020, genre:jazz

market.description: ISO country code for availability filtering. E.g. RU, US, DE

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get audio features of a track: tempo (BPM), energy, danceability, valence (happiness), acousticness. Use for music mood analysis, finding similar songs, or describing a track's feel.

id.description: Spotify track ID from search results

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get song recommendations based on seed tracks, artists, or genres. Use for 'songs like X', 'music similar to this artist', 'recommend upbeat songs'.

seed_tracks.description: Comma-separated track IDs (up to 5 total seeds)

seed_genres.description: Comma-separated genres: pop, rock, jazz, classical, hip-hop etc.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

agent_hints.auth_flow: For public data search use Client Credentials (simpler — just client_id + client_secret, no user login). For user playlists use Authorization Code flow.
agent_hints.mood_mapping: Map moods to audio features: Happy=high valence(0.8+), Energetic=high energy(0.8+), Calm=low energy(0.2-), Sad=low valence(0.2-), Dance=high danceability(0.8+).
agent_hints.preview_url: preview_url gives 30-second MP3 preview — free to play without premium.
agent_hints.market_tip: Always set market=RU for Russian users to filter out unavailable tracks.

limits.rate_limit: Rate limited by Spotify — avoid hammering. Use caching.
